data.title: ElfQuest Jink #1-8 10 11 Near-Complete 10-Issue Lot 1994 WaRP Graphics
data.description:
ElfQuest Jink ran from 1994 to 1996 as WaRP Graphics expanded the ElfQuest universe with a new character and storyline. This is a near-complete run covering issues #1 through 8, plus #10 and #11, including the first issue of the series. Only #9 and #12 are missing.

Stored bagged with individual backing boards by a careful collector. Condition is Very Good across the lot, consistent throughout.

Series | ElfQuest: Jink
Publisher | WaRP Graphics
Issues | #1-8, 10, 11 (10 issues)
Missing | #9 and #12
Condition | VG, bagged and boarded

All my listings ship with free shipping for your ease, none of this $30 shipping on a 1 pound item. I price my listings fairly but please feel free to make an offer. Comics are packed securely with cardboard backing to protect against bending in transit.

Sold As Is.
data.condition_field: Near-complete run of ElfQuest Jink (1994 WaRP Graphics), issues #1-8, 10, and 11. Missing #9 and #12. Includes the first issue of the series. All issues individually bagged with backing boards. Condition is Very Good throughout with no major creasing, spine rolls, or cover damage noted.
